The Substance (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,584,795Details
International Box Office $59,720,652
Worldwide Box Office $77,305,447
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Have you ever dreamt of a better version of yourself? You. Only better in every way. You should try this new product, The Substance. IT CHANGED MY LIFE.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,205,212 (18.2% of total gross)
Legs:5.49 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:22.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,500,000 (worldwide box office is 4.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,949 opening theaters/1,949 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $18,530,033

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 20th, 2024 (Wide) by MUBI
International Releases: September 18th, 2024 (Limited) (Sweden)
September 19th, 2024 (Wide), released as The Substance (Субстанция) (Russia (CIS))
September 19th, 2024 (Limited) (New Zealand)
September 19th, 2024 (Limited) (Germany)
September 19th, 2024 (Limited), released as A Substância (Brazil)
Video Release: October 31st, 2024 by Mubi
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violent content, gore, graphic nudity and language.
(Rating bulletin 2836 (cert #54984), 5/28/2024)
Running Time: 140 minutes
Award nomination: 2025 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Cast, crew, or production detail: F-Rated, F-Rated, Triple
Film festival: Cannes Film Festival 2024
Filming location (country): France
Geographical setting: Los Angeles
Plot point: Cloning, Film Actor, Medical Crimes
Release detail: Festival Acquisition
Subgenre: Body Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Working Title Films, Blacksmith, A Good Story
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Have you ever dreamt of a better version of yourself? You. Only better in every way. You should try this new product, The Substance. IT CHANGED MY LIFE.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,205,212 (18.2% of total gross)
Legs:5.49 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:22.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,500,000 (worldwide box office is 4.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,949 opening theaters/1,949 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $18,530,033

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 20th, 2024 (Wide) by MUBI
International Releases: September 18th, 2024 (Limited) (Sweden)
September 19th, 2024 (Wide), released as The Substance (Субстанция) (Russia (CIS))
September 19th, 2024 (Limited) (New Zealand)
September 19th, 2024 (Limited) (Germany)
September 19th, 2024 (Limited), released as A Substância (Brazil)
Video Release: October 31st, 2024 by Mubi
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violent content, gore, graphic nudity and language.
(Rating bulletin 2836 (cert #54984), 5/28/2024)
Running Time: 140 minutes
Award nomination: 2025 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Cast, crew, or production detail: F-Rated, F-Rated, Triple
Film festival: Cannes Film Festival 2024
Filming location (country): France
Geographical setting: Los Angeles
Plot point: Cloning, Film Actor, Medical Crimes
Release detail: Festival Acquisition
Subgenre: Body Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Working Title Films, Blacksmith, A Good Story
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English
